"[5] ^SIGALERT ISSUED IN LOS ANGELES: THE CRENSHAW BLVD ONRAMP TO WB I-10 WILL BE CLOSED FOR APPROXIMATELY TWO HOURS DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION. REF LOG: 0181"

"[3] ^SIGALERT ISSUED IN LOS ANGELES: WB I-10, WEST OF CESAR CHAVEZ AVENUE. THE EXPRESS LANES WILL BE CLOSED FROM FREMONT AVENUE TO ALAMEDA STREET. CLOSURE WILL REMAIN IN EFFECT UNTIL FURTHER NOTICE DUE TO A TRAFFIC COLLISION. REF LOG: 3492"
